title: Spicy Thai Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Thai-inspired noodle stir fry made with fish, vegetables, and spices. Serve as a filling lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish works well, such as tilapia or cod

ingredients.name: noodles
ingredients.notes: rice noodles or egg noodles work well

instructions: Cook the noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the xtra in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the fish and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Add the noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the fish and xtra.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
